Current weather in Indianapolis, IN (as of ~9-10 AM EDT on April 27, 2026):
Temperature: Around 57–61°F (14–16°C), with a RealFeel near 55–63°F.
Conditions: Mostly cloudy to partly cloudy.⁠Weather
Today's forecast (Monday, April 27):
High: 72–78°F (22–26°C).
Low: Around 60–65°F (16–18°C).
Wind: SSE/SE at 10–25 mph, with gusts possible up to 30+ mph (breezy).
Rain risk: 60–75% chance of showers and thunderstorms, especially this afternoon/evening into tonight. Some storms could be strong or severe (possible hail/damaging winds); rainfall amounts of ¼–1 inch likely in spots.⁠Forecast.weather
Expect increasing clouds and storm development later today. For the most precise real-time updates, check a local source like the National Weather Service or AccuWeather.
